nws_forecast.name: Today
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers and patchy fog before 8am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers between 8am and noon. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 61. South wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog between 11pm and 2am. Partly cloudy. Low around 46, with temperatures rising to around 53 overnight. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.
